km.Bodiam, Sussex, England: បូឌិaម, ស៊ូសេច, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam是William de Bodiam的兒子，出生在英國素可波迪亞姆。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam是William de Bodiam的儿子，出生在英国素可波迪亞姆。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bodiam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam was born in Bodiam, Sussex, England as the son of William de Bodiam. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam est né à Bodiam, Sussex, Angleterre, fils de William de Bodiam. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam wurde in Bodiam, Sussex, England, als Sohn von William de Bodiam geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam è nato il nel Bodiam, Sussex, England come figlio di William de Bodiam. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Bodiam, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスボディアム
ja.lifeSummary: Henry de BodiamはイギリススセックスボディアムでWilliam de Bodiamの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam(은)는 영국 수세스 보디암에서 William de Bodiam의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam nasceu em Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra filho de William de Bodiam. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam родился в местности бодям, суссекс, Англия. Его отца звали William de Bodiam. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodiam nació en Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de William de Bodiam. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
